name: trade_press_batch_v4_30_review_audit_v1
scope: All review-triaged trade_press artifacts from the 30-article batch

items.title: Jabil picks North Carolina for $500M AI facility
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Specific facility siting and spend are direct capital allocation.

items.title: Power enclosure maker AVL to establish its first US plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New plant buildout is a valid capital-flow signal even without headline spend.

items.title: Hyundai boosts US investments to $26B through 2028
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Broad capital allocation is real but not tightly grounded to one rising-demand industrial system.

items.title: PG&E data center pipeline swells to 10GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Pipeline size is important but remains one step upstream of committed buildout.

items.title: US utility Exelon reports data center pipeline of 33GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: High-signal demand indicator, but still not direct spend or project authorization.

items.title: First Energy data center pipeline surges to 2.6GW by 2029
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Relevant for narrowing, not yet direct capital deployment.

items.title: PPL Electric's data center pipeline soars to 14GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Strong directional demand signal but should remain in review state.

items.title: Hitachi Energy commits $250M to address transformer shortage
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit spend to add manufacturing or supply capacity.

items.title: DTE inks first data center deal to grow electric load 25%
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: A concrete deal plus explicit load growth implies real utility buildout pressure.

items.title: Exelon data center pipeline jumps to 17 GW as load forecast turns positive
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Forecast improvement matters, but it remains a planning-stage signal.

items.title: FirstEnergy’s 5-year data center pipeline doubles to 3 GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Pipeline expansion supports narrowing, not direct capital allocation.

items.title: Italy-based Westrafo to build its first US transformer plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New transformer plant is direct manufacturing buildout.
